alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Engaging Iranian Missiles and Drones
alerts.description: UAE air defense systems are actively engaging ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and drones from Iran. Sounds heard across the country are result of ongoing interception operations.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Engaged Iranian Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: UAE air defenses engaged 16 Iranian ballistic missiles and 42 UAVs. Cumulative totals since conflict onset: 414 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, and 1914 UAVs detected.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Intercept Iranian Attack
alerts.description: UAE air defenses successfully engaged 16 ballistic missiles and 42 UAVs launched from Iran on March 29, 2026. Since the start of Iranian attacks, UAE has engaged 414 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles and 1914 UAVs total. Attacks resulted in 8 fatalities and 178 injured.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Intercept 16 Ballistic Missiles and 42 Drones
alerts.description: UAE air defenses successfully intercepted 16 ballistic missiles and 42 drones from Iran on March 29, 2026. Since Iranian attacks began, UAE has dealt with 414 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, and 1914 drones. 2 military personnel martyred, 8 civilians killed, 178 injured.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence

alerts.description: UAE air defense systems are actively intercepting ballistic missiles, cruise missiles, and drones launched from Iran. Sounds heard across the country are from ongoing interception operations.

alerts.description: UAE air defenses engaged Iranian ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and UAVs. Daily: 20 ballistic missiles and 37 UAVs detected. Cumulative totals: 398 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, and 1872 UAVs since Iranian aggression began.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defences Engage 20 Ballistic Missiles and 37 UAVs
alerts.description: UAE air defence systems successfully engaged 20 ballistic missiles and 37 UAVs launched from Iran on March 28, 2026. Since the start of Iranian attacks, UAE has engaged 398 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles and 1872 UAVs total. The attacks resulted in 8 fatalities and 178 injuries.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Intercepts 20 Ballistic Missiles and 379 Drones from Iran
alerts.description: UAE air defenses successfully intercepted 20 ballistic missiles and 379 drones launched from Iran. Since the start of Iranian aggression, UAE has dealt with 398 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, and 1872 drones. Attacks resulted in 2 military casualties and 8 civilian casualties, with 178 injuries ranging from minor to severe.
